raw_jd:
As an Associate Software Tester at Harshad Enterprises, you will have the opportunity to work on cutting-edge software projects and contribute to the success of our products. We are looking for a talented individual with a strong background in Usability Testing, Software Testing, Manual Testing, and Database Testing. 

Key responsibilities include:
1. Conducting thorough usability tests to ensure a seamless user experience.
2. Performing comprehensive software testing to identify and resolve any defects.
3. Executing manual testing procedures to validate software functionality.
4. Conducting database testing to ensure data integrity and accuracy.
5. Collaborating with cross-functional teams to improve product quality and performance.
6. Creating detailed test plans and reports to communicate findings.
7. Continuously learning and staying up-to-date on industry best practices to enhance testing processes.

If you are a detail-oriented individual with a passion for software testing and quality assurance, we would love to have you join our team at Harshad Enterprises. Apply now and take the next step in your career!

gemini_verdict.experience_reason: The job description does not specify an experience requirement, which aligns with fresher eligibility criteria.
gemini_verdict.profile_reason: The candidate's profile is heavily focused on Full Stack development (React, Node.js), while this role is specifically focused on Manual/Software Testing.
gemini_verdict.title: Associate Software Tester
gemini_verdict.summary: This is an entry-level quality assurance role focused on manual and usability testing. The candidate will be responsible for validating software functionality, performing database testing, and creating test reports.
gemini_verdict.match_reason: The candidate's profile is heavily focused on Full Stack development (React, Node.js), while this role is specifically focused on Manual/Software Testing.
